Off Calendar May-11-2018 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar May-17-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Defendant City and County of San Francisco's motion for summary judgment is denied. There is a triable dispute whether the tree roots constituted a dangerous condition of public property. Plaintiff Marc Mac submitted evidence that: 1) the City knew that people walk into tree basins; and 2) the City has regulations about tree basins which protect against tripping hazards. This evidence precludes a determination as a matter of law that exposed roots within a tree basin is not a condition of property that creates a substantial risk of a tripping injury when used with due care. Whether Mr. Mac was himself negligent on the day of the incident is not relevant to the issue whether the property was in a dangerous when used with due care. (Fredette v. City of Long Beach (1986) 187 Cal.App.3d 122, 13). Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 =302/hk
